suite.name: Naukri Login Profile

kw.name: Open Naukri Browser
Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Set Selenium Timeout
kw.doc: Sets the timeout that is used by various keywords.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
Launch Chrome and open Naukri homepage

test.name: TC_001 Login Update Name And Save

kw.name: Login To Naukri
Click Login Nav Button
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
Click the Login button in the top navigation bar

kw.name: Enter Login Credentials
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Clear Element Text
kw.doc: Clears the value of the text-input-element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'nagaraju.251n@gmail.com' into text field 'xpath=//input[@placeholder='Enter your active Email ID / Username']'.
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Clear Element Text
kw.doc: Clears the value of the text-input-element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'Idntknow' into text field 'xpath=//input[@placeholder='Enter your password']'.
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
Fill in email and password fields

kw.name: Submit Login Form
Wait Until Element Is Enabled
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is enabled.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
Click the Login submit button

kw.name: Wait Until Location Contains
kw.doc: Waits until the current URL contains ``expected``.

kw.name: Close AI Chat Popup If Present
Run Keyword And Return Status
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.
Runs the given keyword with given arguments and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Log
kw.msg: AI chat popup detected — attempting to close
kw.arg: AI chat popup detected — attempting to close
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.msg: Element 'xpath=//button[contains(@class,'closeBtn') or contains(@class,'close-btn') or contains(@aria-label,'Close') or contains(@class,'botCloseIcon') or contains(@id,'close')]' not visible after 5 seconds.
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.
kw.status: Element 'xpath=//button[contains(@class,'closeBtn') or contains(@class,'close-btn') or contains(@aria-label,'Close') or contains(@class,'botCloseIcon') or contains(@id,'close')]' not visible after 5 seconds.

kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with given arguments and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Press Keys
kw.msg: Pressing special key ESCAPE to browser.
kw.doc: Simulates the user pressing key(s) to an element or on the active browser.

kw.name: Log
kw.msg: ✅ AI chat popup dismissed via ESC key
kw.arg: ✅ AI chat popup dismissed via ESC key
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Log
kw.arg: No AI chat popup detected — continuing
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
Closes the AI chat/bot popup if it appears after login

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
Full login flow: nav click → credentials → submit → close popup

kw.name: Click View Profile
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Location Contains
kw.doc: Waits until the current URL contains ``expected``.

kw.name: Log
kw.msg: ✅ Clicked View Profile — now on profile page
kw.arg: ✅ Clicked View Profile — now on profile page
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
Click user avatar then click View & Update Profile link

kw.name: Click Edit Pencil Icon
Run Keyword And Return Status
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.
Runs the given keyword with given arguments and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Log
kw.msg: ✅ Clicked pencil icon via standard click
kw.arg: ✅ Clicked pencil icon via standard click
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Execute Javascript
kw.doc: Executes the given JavaScript code with possible arguments.

kw.name: Log
kw.arg: ✅ Clicked pencil icon via JavaScript fallback
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Log
kw.msg: ✅ Edit pencil icon clicked — form should be open now
kw.arg: ✅ Edit pencil icon clicked — form should be open now
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
Click the pencil/edit icon next to name on profile page

kw.name: Update Name And Save
Run Keyword And Return Status
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.
Runs the given keyword with given arguments and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Clear Element Text
kw.doc: Clears the value of the text-input-element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'Naga Raju Kottu' into text field 'xpath=//input[@name='name' or @id='name' or contains(@placeholder,'Name') or contains(@placeholder,'name')]'.
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Log
kw.arg: ✅ Entered name in first name field: ${new_name}
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.msg: Clicking element 'xpath=//button[normalize-space(text())='Save' or normalize-space(text())='Save Changes'] | //button[@type='submit' and (contains(@class,'save') or contains(@class,'Save'))]'.
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Log
kw.msg: ✅ Clicked Save — name updated to: Naga Raju Kottu
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
Clear name field, enter new name and click Save

kw.name: Log
kw.msg: ✅ Name updated to 'Naga Raju Kottu' and saved successfully
kw.arg: ✅ Name updated to 'Naga Raju Kottu' and saved successfully
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

test.doc: Login to Naukri → Close AI popup → Click View Profile → Click Edit pencil icon → Update Name → Click Save

kw.name: Close Naukri Browser
Close All Browsers
kw.doc: Closes all open browsers and resets the browser cache.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
Close all browser windows

suite.doc: Naukri Automation — Login → View Profile → Edit → Update Name → Save

errors.msg: Error in file 'C:\Users\kottu\Downloads\naukri\naukri.resource' on line 22: Setting variable '${PROFILE_PAGE_HEADING} xpath=//div[contains(@class,'name-heading') or contains(@class,'nameHeading') or contains(@class,'profileName')]' failed: Invalid variable name '${PROFILE_PAGE_HEADING} xpath=//div[contains(@class,'name-heading') or contains(@class,'nameHeading') or contains(@class,'profileName')]'.
